calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Vacated

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-01-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

This motion is moot. The case has been dismissed.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Responses To Initial Discovery
Off Calendar Jan-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Responses To Initial Discovery.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted, no opposition filed. Plaintiff Catherine Edwins shall serve verified Code-complaint responses to special interrogatories (set one), requests for production of documents (set one) and form interrogatories-general (set one), and produce all responsive documents, within 30 days. Objections are waived. Plaintiff's counsel Lawrence A. Strick, Esq. shall pay the firm Hassard Bonnington LLP sanctions in the amount of $1,677 within 30 days.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
